LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Way of the Thaumaturge'
Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'My First Scepter'
Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Threat of Intimacy'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65884) and not IsQuestCompleted(65882) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 9

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Threat of Paucity (Primary)'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65885) and not IsQuestCompleted(65884) and IsQuestCompleted(65883) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 9

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Threat of Paucity (Secondary)'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65886) and (IsQuestCompleted(65885) or IsQuestCompleted(65884)) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 14

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Threat of Superiority'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65887) and IsQuestCompleted(65886) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 19

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Threat of Perplexity'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65888) and IsQuestCompleted(65887) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 24

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Hidden Chapter'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(65889) and IsQuestCompleted(65888) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 29

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Facing Your Demons'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66609) and IsQuestCompleted(65889) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 29

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Taking the Black'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66610) and IsQuestCompleted(66609) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 34

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'You'll Never Go Back'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66611) and IsQuestCompleted(66610) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 39

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'International Relations'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66612) and IsQuestCompleted(66611) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 44

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Voidgate Breathes Gloomy'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66613) and IsQuestCompleted(66612) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 44

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Blood Must Flow'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(66614) and IsQuestCompleted(66613) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 49

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Always Bet on Black'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67214) and IsQuestCompleted(65964) and IsQuestCompleted(66614) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 49

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Black Books'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67215) and IsQuestCompleted(67214) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 51

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'An Unexpected Journey'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67216) and IsQuestCompleted(67215) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 53

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'A Cunning Plan'

If.Condition: IsOnMap(139) and not (IsOnSubMap(177) or IsOnSubMap(178) or IsOnSubMap(239) or IsOnSubMap(240) or IsOnSubMap(241))
IsOnMap(139) and not (IsOnSubMap(177) or IsOnSubMap(178) or IsOnSubMap(239) or IsOnSubMap(240) or IsOnSubMap(241))
IsOnMap(139) and not (IsOnSubMap(177) or IsOnSubMap(178) or IsOnSubMap(239) or IsOnSubMap(240) or IsOnSubMap(241))
IsOnMap(139) and not (IsOnSubMap(177) or IsOnSubMap(178) or IsOnSubMap(239) or IsOnSubMap(240) or IsOnSubMap(241))
not IsQuestCompleted(67217) and IsQuestCompleted(67216) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 55

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Black Squawk Down'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67218) and IsQuestCompleted(67217) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 57

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Destruction in the Name of Justice'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(67219) and IsQuestCompleted(67218) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 59

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'The Defiant Ones'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68124) and IsQuestCompleted(67895) and IsQuestCompleted(67219) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 59

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Shades of Shatotto'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68125) and IsQuestCompleted(68124) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 62

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Golems Gone Wild'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68126) and IsQuestCompleted(68125) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 64

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'When the Golems Get Tough'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68127) and IsQuestCompleted(68126) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 67

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'Unnatural Selection'

If.Condition: not IsQuestCompleted(68128) and IsQuestCompleted(68127) and Core.Me.Levels[ClassJobType.Thaumaturge] > 69

LLToast.Message: Beginning Thaumaturge class quest 'One Golem to Rule Them All'
